{{Quote|A very fine valley.|Surveyor [[Jo Keslev]]|<ref name="SWG:TTNGM" />}}
The '''Tulrus Nesting Grounds''', also known as the '''Tulrus Isle''', was a landmass on the volcanic planet of [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].

The main inhabitants of the island were the large beasts known as [[Tulrus/Legends|tulruses]], which tended to roam in packs for mutual protection. It was rumored that a [[Sher Kar/Legends|Sher Kar]], a dangerous predator, lived further inland. [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] elite minions would travel to this island to battle the Sher Kar in order to attain the rank of Wilder.

Found near the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]], it was surrounded by tall mountains connected by a small landmass near the old ruins to the east of the planet.

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer visited the area and collected a [[X1 carbine|Malevolent bowcaster]].<ref name="SWG:RCWMII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Carbine Weapons Mark II}}</ref>

{{Nature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Tulrus Nesting Grounds appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TNG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Tulrus Nesting Grounds was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']] on [[November 1]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:TNG" />
